objective:
I am currently a postdoctoral researcher at the University of Michigan. My research focuses on molecular-scale simulations of mass transport in membrane materials used for desalination, water reuse, and energy generation and storage.

Generally, my research interests involve multiscale computational physics, spanning from the continuum scale down to the atomistic. I'm interested in extending the reach of atomistic simulation results by developing coarse-grain transformations for atomistic simulations of polymeric materials, which will bring insights generated at the molecular-scale to useful continuum scale models.
